scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a vast museum grand hall at deep night. Cold, sterile architecture with marble floors reflecting emergency red alarm lights that pulse rhythmically across the vaulted ceilings and glass display cases. A central gilded Byzantine icon pedestal stands empty, its velvet lining disturbed. Scattered museum visitors flee in distant shadows. Dramatic, high-contrast lighting from the red alarms and cold blue security lamps. Long, empty corridor perspective. Atmospheric tension, cinematic mood, ancient artifacts in dimly lit alcoves, no characters in foreground, just the abandoned space of sudden chaos.

beats.narration: A piercing alarm tears through the silence. You open your eyes, your gaze dragging up from the cold marble floor to meet flashing red lights and the unfamiliar faces of saints painted on the domed ceiling. The gold threads of your ornate gown choke you, and the crown presses heavily against your forehead.
Frantic footsteps and shouting echo from the distance. You stumble, trying to step down from the display platform, but your knees buckle, and you nearly fall.
Just as the dark, looming shadows are about to engulf you, a man in a black uniform shoves past the crowd blocking his way and rushes up to you. He grabs your wrist, his palm as cold as a gravestone.
beats.speaker: Shen Yuan
beats.line: Don't believe their talk of a 'miracle.' If you want to live, come with me.
beats.lineDelivery: Speaking rapidly in a lowered voice, with unquestionable authority, his breath slightly ragged from running

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yuan
activeCharacters.pose: Rushing against the panicked crowd, his black security uniform silhouetted against the red light, his expression cold and tense

beats.narration: His grip is incredibly strong, nearly dragging you off the platform. Your crown slips askew, and a few stray strands of hair cling to your sweat-dampened forehead. Pulled along by him, you stumble into a dimly lit fire escape, leaving the chaos and red lights behind.

effect.nextSceneSeed: In a quiet, dimly lit museum staff break room, you and Shen Yuan finally stop, and he begins to explain the lie of the 'Icon'.

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yuan
activeCharacters.pose: Though you break free, he quickly turns to block the path between you and the passage entrance, his brow furrowed

characters.name: Shen Yuan
characters.voiceDescription: Female, around 20 years old. Her voice is clear and slightly ethereal, as if from a distant era. Her tone is calm, carrying a hint of determination and a subtle, hard-to-detect confusion. Her speaking pace is moderate to slow, with clear pronunciation in standard Mandarin, possessing the elegance and aloofness of a court noblewoman.
characters.visualDescription: Young woman, around 20 years old, long flowing dark hair with subtle golden highlights, large captivating eyes with a depth of ancient wisdom, serene and determined facial features, elegant high-collared Byzantine-inspired robe in deep blue and gold with intricate geometric mosaic patterns, a subtle golden halo motif embroidered on the hood, composed of sparkling glass tesseræ textures, majestic, spiritual, and ancient ambiance, vertical composition, Byzantine mosaic art style

storyState.logline: You are the last princess of Byzantium, sacrificed to the 'Icon' to prolong the empire's life, only to awaken in a museum a thousand years later. A mysterious guardian tells you the Icon is a lie and the true imperial legacy is hidden in the secrets of your bloodline—but those who wish to steal this secret have already infiltrated the museum.
storyState.genreTags: Female-oriented / Mystery & Adventure / Twists & Counterattacks / Historical Fantasy / Sweet Romance & Redemption
storyState.protagonist: You are the last princess of the Byzantine Empire, sealed within the Icon under the guise of a 'sacrifice.' Now, you awaken in a museum a thousand years later with fragmented memories, recalling only a cold ritual and the imperial crest. You seek to reclaim your memory and identity, and more importantly, to uncover the truth behind the empire's fall. And what exactly is that self-proclaimed guardian protecting? Your weakness: the dormant power in your bloodline can backfire; overusing it will cause you to forget who you are.
storyState.castNotes:
Shen Yuan: A night-shift museum security guard, but actually the last descendant of the 'Guardian' family. Aloof and taciturn on the outside, he treats you with a sense of familiarity and restraint that spans a thousand years. He knows your secrets but seems to be hiding more of the truth about the 'Icon.'
Lin Wei: A young archaeological researcher at the museum. Warm and straightforward, she initially helps you, thinking you are just an ordinary person with amnesia. However, the research team behind her has a dangerous interest in the Byzantine imperial bloodline.
'The Shadow': A blurry figure appearing only in security camera blind spots and ancient murals, seemingly watching you from the dark. Who are they? Friend or foe?
storyState.synopsis: You awaken in front of the Icon in the museum, surrounded by alarms and crowds. A mysterious security guard, Shen Yuan, breaks through the barrier, claims the Icon is a lie, and forces you to flee the scene with him into a fire escape.
openThreads: Why is the power of the Icon 'fake'? What exactly does it seal away?
What exactly is the 'secret of the bloodline' that Shen Yuan knows?
Though 'The Shadow' has yet to appear, is there a gaze following you from the dark amidst the crisis?
relationships: Shen Yuan: First contact. He forcefully intervenes to save you, claiming to know the secrets of the Icon and yourself, maintaining a firm and mysterious attitude.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: In a secure area inside the museum (such as a break room or archives), Shen Yuan gives you a preliminary explanation of the truth behind the 'Icon' and the duties of the 'Guardians,' while the first wave of pursuers or monitors closes in.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game oriented towards a 【Female-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid plot twists in the style of short-form web dramas.
Story Style: Multi-branching twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and satisfying.
Opening setting of the featured story 'Twilight of the Saint': She is the last bloodline of the Byzantine imperial family, sacrificed to the 'Holy Icon' to prolong the empire's life. When she awakens in a museum a thousand years later, a mysterious guardian tells her: the power of the Icon is a lie, and the true imperial legacy lies buried within the secrets of her bloodline.
Please jump straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Byzantine mosaic style, vertical composition. A stunningly beautiful mosaic portrait of a royal empress with large, captivating eyes, a crown of rubies and pearls, and a glittering golden halo. Composed of thousands of sparkling glass tesseræ in deep blues and golds. Majestic, spiritual, and ancient ambiance.
